title: California Atmospheric River Floods
summary: Severe flooding caused road closures, stranded vehicles, evacuation orders, and infrastructure damage across multiple regions.
insights: Shelter demand rose as floodwaters spread
recommended_action: Deploy rescue resources near major roads and prepare evacuation shelters.

title: Downtown Power Outage 2025
summary: A downtown power outage affected traffic lights, hospitals, elevators, and vulnerable residents requiring medical equipment.
recommended_action: Notify utilities, check hospitals, and prioritize medically vulnerable residents.

title: Nursing Home Flood Evacuation 2024
summary: Flooding near a nursing home required evacuation of elderly residents with oxygen and mobility needs.
recommended_action: Dispatch medical evacuation support immediately and secure accessible transport routes.
